mapper.select: select pc.id, pc.post_id as postId, u.username, pc.content, pc.create_time as createTime from post_comment pc left join user u on pc.user_id = u.id where pc.post_id = #{postId} and pc.is_deleted = 0 order by pc.create_time asc

select pc.id, pc.post_id as postId, u.username, pc.content, pc.create_time as createTime from post_comment pc left join user u on pc.user_id = u.id where pc.is_deleted = 0 and pc.id in
#{id}
mapper.insert: insert into post_comment (post_id, user_id, content) values (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: select count(1) from post_comment where post_id = #{postId} and is_deleted = 0
